---
title: "Life"
format: html
---

I have a strong interest in nonprofit work and startups alike. I love to explore the intersection of social impact and entrepreneurial thinking in innovations!

Earlier this term I participated in the pitch competition, which i have learnt a lot from (more updates to come!) More recently, I competed in a datathon, where i was able to win first place with my analysis on the impact of natural disaster on vietnamese economy and people.

I enjoy reading, working out, flying hot air balloons, doing photography and cinematography!

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/IMG_0055.JPG)

![](images/IMG_5821.JPG)

![](images/IMG_6356.JPG)

![](images/IMG_6944.JPG)

![](images/IMG_8389.JPG)

![](images/IMG_8434.JPG)

![](images/IMG_8724.JPG)

![](images/IMG_9526.JPG)

![](images/IMG_9735.JPG)

![](images/IMG_4012.JPG)

:::
